claim: Gemini 2.5 Pro significantly improved at code generation tasks - can now create functional Angry Birds and Space Invaders games in a single shot where earlier versions failed
actionable: Test Gemini 2.5 Pro for game development and complex interactive code generation tasks
source_title: The Improved Gemini 2.5 Pro - A Coding Powerhouse

claim: With 1M+ token context windows, you can provide entire videos, multiple documentation files, and code samples simultaneously for context-rich code generation
actionable: Leverage large context windows by chunking documentation, video transcripts, and code examples into single prompts for better one-shot generation
source_title: The Improved Gemini 2.5 Pro - A Coding Powerhouse

claim: Chain-of-thought reasoning combined with large context enables one-shot generation of complete, working applications from video tutorials and documentation without follow-up prompts
actionable: Include video tutorials and full documentation in context and rely on chain-of-thought reasoning for complete application generation
source_title: The Improved Gemini 2.5 Pro - A Coding Powerhouse

claim: Models can infer required tools and guardrails from documentation without explicit specification - providing ADK docs and examples enables automatic tool selection and safety implementation
actionable: Provide comprehensive documentation and examples in context so models can infer appropriate tools and safety measures
source_title: The Improved Gemini 2.5 Pro - A Coding Powerhouse

claim: The thinking/reasoning process can be leveraged to break down complex tasks into structured plans before implementation, improving code quality and correctness
actionable: Request explicit reasoning and planning before code generation to ensure comprehensive, correct implementations
source_title: The Improved Gemini 2.5 Pro - A Coding Powerhouse
